CustomField.description: Number of Opportunity records processed per batch execution during Contact hard credit rollup calculations in Skew Mode. Skew Mode processes Contacts with many related Opportunities (above the Skew Mode Threshold). Default is 1000. Reduce if the skew mode batch job fails due to governor limits.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Opportunities per batch during Contact Skew Mode rollups. Default is 1000. Skew Mode handles Contacts with many Opportunities.
CustomField.label: Contact Skew Mode Batch Size
